body:
# All Most Hate The SUN

## Description

**All Most Hate The SUN** is a Minecraft Forge mod that makes hostile mobs vulnerable to sunlight, ensuring they burn during the day just like vanilla zombies and skeletons—but with even more intensity.

### What It Does

**Universal Sun Damage**
- All hostile mobs (any entity classified as a monster) now burn in direct sunlight
- Sunlight damage is significantly stronger than vanilla burning
- Mobs catch fire and take periodic damage while exposed

**Enhanced Burning Mechanics**
- Burning duration is extended compared to normal fire
- Damage occurs every second while mobs are in sunlight
- Works in all dimensions where sunlight is present
- Affects any hostile mob, not just the ones that normally burn

**Natural Gameplay Integration**
- No commands or configuration needed—just install and play
- Automatically balances survival gameplay by clearing hostile mobs during daytime
- Perfect for players who want safer days without eliminating night-time challenges
description: All hostile mobs burn during daylight hours with increased sun damage.
title: All Most Hate The SUN
